summary: This topic details how to create and configure different types of concession groups (e.g., sibling, staff ward, manual) within the ERP system. Concessions can be applied as a percentage or a flat amount on specific fee heads and are linked to the fee installment structure.
steps: Navigate to the 'Concession Group' section (likely under 'Institute Setup' > 'Fees').
Enter the 'Name' of the concession (e.g., Staff Card Concession, Sibling Concession, Manual Concession).
Select the 'Fee Head(s)' to which this concession applies (e.g., Annual Fees, Tuition Fee).
Enter the 'Value' based on the selected type (e.g., 50 for 50% or 5000 for a flat amount).
Click 'Add' to save the concession group.
business_rules: Concessions are applied based on the defined fee heads and their corresponding installments.
For 'Manual Concession', it is recommended to tick all fee heads and set the flat amount to zero initially, allowing for flexible manual input during assignment.
important_notes: The system supports various concession types like sibling, staff ward, and third child concessions.
The names of concession groups are user-defined and will appear in a dropdown list when assigning concessions to students.
questions: How do I create a new concession group?
What is the difference between percentage and flat concession types?
Can a concession be applied to multiple fee heads?
What is a 'Manual Concession' and how is it configured?
Where do I define the name for a concession like 'Staff Card Concession'?
